# STRAT.028 ? Transactional Analysis (Berne)

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** strategic_frameworks
**Subcategory:** psychological_frameworks
**Domain:** PSYCHOLOGICAL_FRAMEWORKS
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Parent, Adult, Child ego states; transactions; life scripts; games people play; strokes; OK-ness positions

## Application
Identify ego states; analyze transactions; recognize scripts; spot psychological games; give positive strokes; 'I'm OK, You're OK'

## Key Values
- Ego states
- Transaction awareness
- Script recognition
- Game spotting
- OK positions
